elements.text:
run/
  architect_datapack/
    pack.mcmeta                 # pack_format 48
    data/architect/function/
      build.mcfunction
      clear.mcfunction
      load.mcfunction           # optional
      tick.mcfunction           # optional
  raw_build.mcfunction
  blueprint.json
  preview.html
  run_report.md
